Bet Grade PropIQ™
-- props
How PropIQ grading works

PropIQ™ is a bet grade (5–98), not a unique slate rank. Several props can share the same score (especially 98, the cap). Use the badge under each play — and How to Bet — to see why grades differ. When grades tie, the board sorts by edge → L10 → confidence.

PropIQ action tiers

  • 83+ — ELITE PLAY (top grade band)
  • 70–82 — PRIME PICK
  • 55–69 — STRONG
  • 40–54 — PASS / lean away
  • <40 — FADE

Filter pills (Ultimate / Prime / Strong) use these score bands. The ⭐ ULTIMATE card badge also requires strong sheet hit rates — not PropIQ alone.

Conviction badges (IQ + confidence)

  • 🔒 LOCK — IQ ≥ 90 & confidence ≥ 80%
  • 🚀 HAMMER — IQ ≥ 83 & confidence ≥ 75%
  • ✅ GO — elite IQ + solid confidence, or high confidence + strong IQ
  • 🎯 PLAY — IQ ≥ 70 & confidence ≥ 65%
  • 👍 LEAN — confidence-led spot (IQ moderate)
  • ⚠️ GRADE↑ / CONF↑ — IQ and confidence disagree; size down
  • 👀 WATCH — track, not max stake
  • ⏸ PASS — weak combined profile

Confidence (ring) reflects hit-rate consistency, sample, cushion, and stability. Hover any conviction badge on a card for the exact IQ + confidence pair.

How PropIQ grading works

PropIQ™ is a bet grade (5–98), not a unique slate rank. Several rows can share the same score (especially 98, the cap). Each market row shows a conviction badge (IQ + confidence). The board sorts by PropIQ → edge → L10 → confidence when grades tie.

PropIQ action tiers

  • 83+ — ELITE PLAY (top grade band)
  • 70–82 — PRIME PICK
  • 55–69 — STRONG
  • 40–54 — PASS / lean away
  • <40 — FADE

Purple/gold row styling follows PropIQ tier. Open a prop on the Props tab for full How to Bet factor breakdown.

Conviction badges (IQ + confidence)

  • 🔒 LOCK — IQ ≥ 90 & confidence ≥ 80%
  • 🚀 HAMMER — IQ ≥ 83 & confidence ≥ 75%
  • ✅ GO — elite IQ + solid confidence, or high confidence + strong IQ
  • 🎯 PLAY — IQ ≥ 70 & confidence ≥ 65%
  • 👍 LEAN — confidence-led spot (IQ moderate)
  • ⚠️ GRADE↑ / CONF↑ — IQ and confidence disagree; size down
  • 👀 WATCH — track, not max stake
  • ⏸ PASS — weak combined profile

Confidence reflects hit-rate consistency, sample, cushion, and stability. Hover any conviction badge for the exact IQ + confidence pair.

Welcome to PropEdge
Here's how to read your prop cards
  • ⭐ ULTIMATE Multi-factor lock: base rating 82+, L10 ≥ 70%, L5 ≥ 65% — all signals aligned
  • 🎯 PRIME Score 85+ — strong model signal with high recent hit rate
  • ✅ STRONG Score 72+ — solid edge with consistent recent performance
  • SOLID Score 62+ — decent value, use as part of a parlay
